abilities.name: Hard to Wound +2
abilities.description: Damage flips against this character suffer --.

abilities.name: Caustic Aura
abilities.description: Living characters beginning turn within a2 suffer 2 damage and cannot declare (0) Actions until next turn.

abilities.name: Desolate Warping
abilities.description: After killing Living, Construct, or Undead, may discard card to transform it into Abomination that cannot act this round. This character heals to full Wounds.

abilities.name: Lost Focus
abilities.description: If killed, becomes two Abominations that cannot act this round.

abilities.name: Melee Expert
abilities.description: Generates 1 additional AP on turn, but only for Close Combat attacks.

actions: (1) Entropy Claws (Pugilism) | AV: 6T (14T) | Rg: y3 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 3/4/6 damage. Tome Consuming Touch: After damaging, heals amount equal to damage target suffered.
(1) Desolate Supplications (Necromancy) | This character may suffer up to 4 damage. Every character within p6 must pass TN 13 Toughness duel or suffer damage equal to what this character suffered -1.
system.notes: Towering monstrosities formed when 4+ Abominations converge. Ooze putrid fluid from seams. Heal by consuming. No loyalty - attack anyone. Only annihilation ends the cycle.
